title: The Avengers
cast: Robert Downey Jr., Chris Evans, Scarlett Johansson
overview: Earth's mightiest heroes team up to stop Loki and his alien army from conquering the planet.

title: Avengers: Endgame
cast: Robert Downey Jr., Chris Evans, Scarlett Johansson
overview: The remaining Avengers assemble one last time to undo the damage caused by Thanos and restore balance to the universe.

title: Avengers: Infinity War
cast: Robert Downey Jr., Chris Hemsworth, Chris Evans
overview: The Avengers and their allies must be willing to sacrifice everything to stop the powerful Thanos from wiping out half the universe.

title: The Dark Knight
cast: Christian Bale, Heath Ledger, Aaron Eckhart
overview: Batman faces his greatest psychological and physical test as he battles the Joker, a criminal mastermind who wants to plunge Gotham into chaos.

title: Batman Begins
cast: Christian Bale, Michael Caine, Liam Neeson
overview: After witnessing his parents death, Bruce Wayne trains to become a symbol of fear for criminals and returns to Gotham as Batman.

title: The Dark Knight Rises
cast: Christian Bale, Tom Hardy, Anne Hathaway
overview: Eight years after the Joker's rise, Batman is forced out of retirement to save Gotham from the ruthless mercenary Bane.

title: Interstellar
cast: Matthew McConaughey, Anne Hathaway, Jessica Chastain
overview: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival as Earth becomes uninhabitable.

title: The Notebook
cast: Ryan Gosling, Rachel McAdams, James Garner
overview: A poor young man and a wealthy young woman fall deeply in love in the 1940s, but must overcome social barriers and years of separation to be together.

title: Inception
cast: Leonardo DiCaprio, Joseph Gordon-Levitt, Elliot Page
overview: A skilled thief who steals secrets through dream-sharing technology is given a chance to have his criminal history erased by planting an idea into a target's mind.

title: Iron Man
cast: Robert Downey Jr., Gwyneth Paltrow, Jeff Bridges
overview: A billionaire industrialist and genius inventor builds a powered suit of armor to fight evil after being held captive in a cave with a bomb-making group.

title: Titanic
cast: Leonardo DiCaprio, Kate Winslet, Billy Zane
overview: A young aristocrat falls in love with a poor artist aboard the ill-fated luxury liner during its doomed maiden voyage.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
cast: Tim Robbins, Morgan Freeman, Bob Gunton
overview: A banker wrongly convicted of murder forms a lasting friendship with a fellow inmate over decades in prison while never losing hope.

title: Joker
cast: Joaquin Phoenix, Robert De Niro, Zazie Beetz
overview: A struggling comedian and society's neglect of him push a mentally troubled man down a path of chaos and crime in Gotham City.

title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
cast: Tom Holland, Zendaya, Benedict Cumberbatch
overview: When Peter Parker's secret identity is revealed, he asks a sorcerer for help, but a spell gone wrong brings villains from other universes into his world.

title: 3 Idiots
cast: Aamir Khan, R. Madhavan, Sharman Joshi
overview: Two friends search for their long-lost engineering college buddy, reminiscing about the hilarious and touching lessons he taught them about life.

title: Dangal
cast: Aamir Khan, Fatima Sana Shaikh, Sanya Malhotra
overview: A former wrestler trains his daughters to become world-class wrestlers despite societal resistance, fulfilling his own unrealized Olympic dream.

title: Sholay
cast: Amitabh Bachchan, Dharmendra, Sanjeev Kumar
overview: Two small-time criminals are hired by a retired police officer to capture a ruthless bandit terrorizing his village.

title: Lagaan
cast: Aamir Khan, Gracy Singh, Rachel Shelley
overview: Villagers in colonial India accept a challenge to play cricket against British officers to avoid paying an unfair tax during a famine.

title: Zindagi Na Milegi Dobara
cast: Hrithik Roshan, Farhan Akhtar, Abhay Deol
overview: Three friends on a bachelor road trip through Spain rediscover themselves and confront their fears through adventure sports and old wounds.

title: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge
cast: Shah Rukh Khan, Kajol, Amrish Puri
overview: A young man falls in love with a woman during a European trip and travels to India to win over her traditional family and marry her.

title: Gully Boy
cast: Ranveer Singh, Alia Bhatt, Siddhant Chaturvedi
overview: A street rapper from the slums of Mumbai chases his dream of becoming a hip-hop star while breaking free from his circumstances.

title: Andhadhun
cast: Ayushmann Khurrana, Tabu, Radhika Apte
overview: A blind pianist gets entangled in a murder investigation after witnessing more than he should have, leading to a web of deception.

title: Queen
cast: Kangana Ranaut, Rajkummar Rao, Lisa Haydon
overview: After being jilted by her fiance days before the wedding, a shy Delhi girl embarks on her honeymoon alone and discovers her own independence.

title: Taare Zameen Par
cast: Darsheel Safary, Aamir Khan, Tisca Chopra
overview: A struggling dyslexic child's life changes when an art teacher recognizes his talent and helps him overcome his learning difficulties.

title: The Godfather
cast: Marlon Brando, Al Pacino, James Caan
overview: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his empire to his reluctant youngest son.
